title: riso-icon-grid-contact-sheet
prompt:
Make a RISOGRAPH "print test" CONTACT SHEET zine page from this engraving of a crowned robed king. Tile the same king figure in a 3x3 grid of nine cells on warm off-white paper. Each cell prints the king in a DIFFERENT single riso spot ink or overprint: fluorescent pink, federal blue, sunflower yellow, and overprint mixes (pink+blue=purple, blue+yellow=green, pink+yellow=orange). Vary the registration offset per cell — some cells deliberately misregistered with ghosted double-images, some clean. Preserve the engraved cross-hatch line quality in every cell. Visible paper grain and roller texture.

Typography: tiny monospaced index labels under each cell in liturgical Latin + plate numbers, e.g. "PL·I REX", "PL·II SANCTVS", "PL·III ORA PRO NOBIS", "PL·IV MEMENTO MORI", set in a clean workshop mono. A thin registration crosshair mark in each corner of the page. Top margin header in inscriptional Roman caps: "IMPRESSIO · REGIS". Print-shop proof-sheet aesthetic. 8.5x11 zine page.
